basic_details.job_title: RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Rajkot Municipal Corporation (RMC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Panel Advocate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 10-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Valid Advocate Sanad, Minimum 5 years experience in Food Safety Act related cases or Food Safety Appellate Tribunal cases
qualification.details: Valid Advocate Sanad. Minimum 5 years of experience in Food Safety Act related court cases or Food Safety Appellate Tribunal Gandhinagar cases.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.rmc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RMC Panel Advocate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RMC Panel Advocate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Valid Advocate Sanad. Minimum 5 years of experience in Food Safety Act related court cases or Food Safety Appellate Tribunal Gandhinagar cases.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.rmc.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RMC Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RMC Panel Advocate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the RMC Panel Advocate post is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Panel Advocate position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Valid Advocate Sanad and have a minimum of 5 years of experience in Food Safety Act related court cases or Food Safety Appellate Tribunal cases.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the RMC Panel Advocate job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this RMC Panel Advocate recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Panel Advocate post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Panel Advocate position is Rs. 6000/- per case, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of Rajkot Municipal Corporation?
faq.answer: The official website of Rajkot Municipal Corporation (RMC) is www.rmc.gov.in. You can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this RMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Panel Advocate post in RMC is contractual. This means the position is for a fixed term.

faq.question: Q8. What is the notification date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date for the RMC Panel Advocate recruitment is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit restrictions for the Panel Advocate position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits for this recruitment. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.
